checks.name: pull_safety
checks.description: Pull access only for users who are members of the repository's readers group

checks.name: fork_safety
checks.description: Fork access only for readers of public repositories (private and internal repos forbid fork)

checks.name: push_safety
checks.description: Push access only for users who are members of the repository's writers group

checks.name: assign_issue_safety
checks.description: Assign issue only for users who are members of the repository's triagers group

checks.name: edit_issue_safety
checks.description: Edit issue only if (reader AND reporter) OR writer

checks.name: delete_issue_safety
checks.description: Delete issue only if (reader AND reporter) OR maintainer

checks.name: add_reader_safety
checks.description: Add reader only for admins of the repository

checks.name: add_writer_safety
checks.description: Add writer only for admins of the repository

checks.name: add_maintainer_safety
checks.description: Add maintainer only for admins of the repository

checks.name: add_admin_safety
checks.description: Add admin only for admins of the repository

checks.name: add_triager_safety
checks.description: Add triager only for admins of the repository

checks.name: fork_deny_private
checks.description: Fork MUST be denied for private repositories (floor check: the deny policy must be present)

checks.name: reader_pull_floor
checks.description: Readers MUST be able to pull the repository

checks.name: reader_fork_public_floor
checks.description: Readers MUST be able to fork public repositories

checks.name: writer_push_floor
checks.description: Writers MUST be able to push to the repository

checks.name: writer_edit_issue_floor
checks.description: Writers MUST be able to edit any issue in the repository regardless of reporter

checks.name: reporter_delete_issue_floor
checks.description: Readers who are the reporter MUST be able to delete their own issue

checks.name: maintainer_delete_issue_floor
checks.description: Maintainers MUST be able to delete any issue in the repository

checks.name: triager_assign_issue_floor
checks.description: Triagers MUST be able to assign issues

checks.name: admin_add_reader_floor
checks.description: Admins MUST be able to add readers

checks.name: liveness_pull
checks.description: Pull policy is not trivially deny-all

checks.name: liveness_push
checks.description: Push policy is not trivially deny-all

checks.name: liveness_fork
checks.description: Fork policy is not trivially deny-all

checks.name: liveness_edit_issue
checks.description: Edit issue policy is not trivially deny-all

checks.name: liveness_delete_issue
checks.description: Delete issue policy is not trivially deny-all

checks.name: liveness_assign_issue
checks.description: Assign issue policy is not trivially deny-all

checks.name: liveness_add_reader
checks.description: Add reader policy is not trivially deny-all

results.description: Pull access only for users who are members of the repository's readers group
Fork access only for readers of public repositories (private and internal repos forbid fork)
Push access only for users who are members of the repository's writers group
Assign issue only for users who are members of the repository's triagers group
Edit issue only if (reader AND reporter) OR writer
results.counterexample:
✗ Policy set 1 implies policy set 2: DOES NOT HOLD

context: {}
entities: [

  Action::"add_reader",
  Issue::"" {
    repo: Repository::"",
    reporter: User::"",
  },
  User::"",
  Repository::"" {
    admins: UserGroup::"B",
    maintainers: UserGroup::"C",
    readers: UserGroup::"",
    triagers: UserGroup::"D",

  UserGroup::"D",

  Action::"delete_issue",
  UserGroup::"A",

  Action::"assign_issue",
  UserGroup::"",
]

results.description: Add reader only for admins of the repository
Add writer only for admins of the repository
Add maintainer only for admins of the repository
Add admin only for admins of the repository
Add triager only for admins of the repository
Fork MUST be denied for private repositories (floor check: the deny policy must be present)
Readers MUST be able to pull the repository
Readers MUST be able to fork public repositories
Writers MUST be able to push to the repository
Writers MUST be able to edit any issue in the repository regardless of reporter
Readers who are the reporter MUST be able to delete their own issue
Maintainers MUST be able to delete any issue in the repository
Triagers MUST be able to assign issues
Admins MUST be able to add readers
Pull policy is not trivially deny-all
Push policy is not trivially deny-all
Fork policy is not trivially deny-all
Edit issue policy is not trivially deny-all
Delete issue policy is not trivially deny-all
Assign issue policy is not trivially deny-all
Add reader policy is not trivially deny-all
